description: Lightweight broadband CNTs@Nd-BaM/PE absorber optimization across 8.2-18 GHz with minimum bandwidth constraint
notes: Frequency range 8.2-18 GHz matches the waveguide VNA measurement band used in the reference study (Wang et al., Materials 2024). EAB max is 9.8 GHz (full band). Density penalty dominant (0.5) for lightweight optimization. EAB < 4.0 GHz => infeasible.
